prompt: Create a luxurious pastel product photograph of an open high-end chocolate gift box themed around an ethereal ocean princess. The scene is a dreamy macro-style tabletop arrangement in pale aqua blue, pearl white, blush pink, and champagne gold, with soft diffused lighting, shallow depth of field, glossy reflections, and sparkling bokeh. The open rectangular box is light blue with gold trim and a hinged illustrated lid. On the inside lid, show a delicate anime-style mermaid-like girl with long flowing iridescent white-blonde hair, bare shoulders, pearl necklace, translucent blue shell accents, coral and bubbles around her, and a plain pale square censor/placeholder block covering the center of her face. The lid design has ornate gold corner filigree, small shell motifs, underwater bubbles, pink coral, and elegant gold branding text: Japanese hiragana “のぞむ”, large serif “NOZOMU”, and smaller uppercase “LIMITED CHOCOLAT COLLECTION”. In the lower half, show exactly 15 individual luxury chocolates arranged in a 3-row by 5-column gold compartment tray, each in a brown paper cup: row 1 has a faceted blue-purple jewel dome, a pale aqua shell chocolate, a white pearl-topped gold-speckled dome, a blue crystal pyramid bonbon, and a dark blue round bonbon with pink coral sprinkles; row 2 has a white gold-speckled dome, a glossy dark blue-purple orb, a blue dome with pink coral sprinkles, a white ridged shell, and a translucent pale blue faceted gem; row 3 has a pale blue heart, a ribbed aqua shell with small pearls, a turquoise faceted gold-flake jewel, a pale blue dome topped with a pearl, and a teal-gold faceted gem. Surround the box with satin blue ribbons printed with subtle gold lettering and shell icons, pearl strands, glass bubbles, seashells, small pink coral pieces, crystal ornaments, and glittering highlights. Add a small matching square card in front of the box with ornate border and the same branding text “のぞむ”, “NOZOMU”, “LIMITED CHOCOLAT COLLECTION”. Use premium Japanese confectionery packaging aesthetics, ultra-detailed textures, photorealistic product photography mixed with soft anime illustration on the lid, elegant composition, no extra text, no watermark. Optional custom details: NOZOMU, のぞむ, LIMITED CHOCOLAT COLLECTION, pale aqua blue, pearl white, blush pink, champagne gold, ethereal ocean princess with iridescent white-blonde hair.
